items.front: When two aircraft call for different time-based longitudinal standards, which one is used?
items.back: Apply the larger of the two standards.

items.front: How is reciprocal-track longitudinal separation protected in oceanic operations?
items.back: Keep vertical separation until one of the paragraph's report-based passing conditions is satisfied.

items.front: What is required before reduced longitudinal minima may be used with Mach number technique?
items.back: Use turbojet aircraft only, issue each aircraft a Mach number or approved range, and apply the reduced minima only when the required Mach differential exists.
